STATEMENT OF WORK
PROJECT: NGIS PHASE 3 — DATA CENTRE CONSOLIDATION
Document Number: SOW-NGIS-P3-2024-001
Version: 2.1
Date: September 15, 2024
Contracting Authority: Shared Services Canada (SSC)
Classification: Protected B

---

1. BACKGROUND AND CONTEXT

Shared Services Canada (SSC) is undertaking the Next-Generation
Infrastructure Strategy (NGIS) Phase 3, which involves the consolidation
of three Government of Canada (GC) data centre facilities into a single
modernized enterprise data centre.
